waiver.reason_summary: The remote build-server gate could not be reached or stayed unavailable long enough to block the governed pre-push path.
waiver.detail: ADR Tier 3 Phase 2 analysis: re-scoring 30 ADRs with evidence-depth methodology; 7 upgraded to Partial Implemented; index regeneration; remote build server (10.10.10.30) timeout during validation; local YAML syntax and index coherence verified
substitute_evidence: 30 ADRs analyzed with evidence-depth methodology from Phase 1
